brand_identity.name: MediVision
brand_identity.description: A professional multi-disease prediction and analytics platform blending clinical accuracy with modern AI.
brand_identity.design_personality: Clean, Sterile (in a good way), Intelligent, Empathetic

headings.name: Manrope
headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6, Hero text, and metric numbers. Weights: 600/700 for emphasis, 400 for elegance.

body.name: Public Sans
body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI labels, buttons, and inputs. Excellent legibility for data.

primary.description: Medical Blue (Sky 600) - Trust, Technology, Clarity. Use for primary actions, active states.

secondary.description: Slate 100 - Clinical background, secondary buttons. Soft and neutral.

accent.description: Slate 900 - Deep Obsidian. Use for heavy contrast, footer, major headings.

rules: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle white/grey washes.
Text on colored backgrounds must be white.
Input fields should have a white background with a Slate-200 border.

inputs.style: h-12 bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-sky-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500/20 rounded-lg text-base transition-all

cards.feature: bg-slate-50 border border-transparent hover:bg-white hover:border-sky-100 transition-all duration-300

hero_main.alt: Doctor analyzing patient data on a tablet with x-ray visualization
hero_main.placement: Landing Page Hero Section (Right side or Background Overlay)

feature_lab.alt: Medical researcher working with a microscope in a high-tech lab

trust_consultation.alt: Doctor having a compassionate consultation with a patient
trust_consultation.placement: About/Trust Section or Patient History Page

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope'.
Avoid gradients for the main background. Use solid white or very subtle Slate-50.
Data visualization charts must use the 'Medical' palette: Blue (primary), Teal (secondary), Slate (neutral).
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
Dashboard layout should be dense but legible. Use 'Bento' grid logic.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1 on all backgrounds.
Images: Use border-radius 'rounded-2xl' for all feature images to soften the look.
instructions_to_main_agent: 3. Set up the 'Dashboard' with a sidebar layout (fixed left, scrollable right).
4. Implement the 'Disease Prediction' form as a clean, multi-step or well-grouped form to avoid overwhelming the user.
5. Use 'recharts' or 'shadcn/chart' for the prediction results visualizations.
6. Create a 'History' page using a clean data table with status badges (High Risk = Red, Low Risk = Green).
